metadata.source: Community data compilation — coordinates estimated from map image analysis; verify in-game for precision
metadata.attribution: Location data compiled from community guides. Forza Horizon 5 © Microsoft Corporation.
metadata.coordinateNote: Coordinates are x/y percentages (0-100) of the fh5-mexico.jpg map image (4000x2394px). Use the MapGenie Helper in the Location Finder to calibrate with precision.
metadata.accuracyNote: Community-sourced and estimated; not official game data.

locations.name: Barn Find - 1973 BMW 2002 Turbo
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1973 BMW 2002 Turbo — found in the Guanajuato hills area

locations.name: Barn Find - 1953 Chevrolet Corvette
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1953 Chevrolet Corvette — found north of the main highway near Baja

locations.name: Barn Find - 1968 Dodge Dart Hemi Super Stock
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1968 Dodge Dart Hemi Super Stock — found near Teotihuacán

locations.name: Barn Find - 1999 Dodge Viper GTS ACR
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1999 Dodge Viper GTS ACR — found in the southeast jungle near Tulum

locations.name: Barn Find - 1962 Ferrari 250 GTO
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1962 Ferrari 250 GTO — found near Mulegé on the west coast

locations.name: Barn Find - 1989 Ferrari F40 Competizione
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1989 Ferrari F40 Competizione — found near Cascadas de Agua Azul

locations.name: Barn Find - 1956 Ford F-100
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1956 Ford F-100 — found in Tierra Próspera farmland

locations.name: Barn Find - 1968 Ford Mustang GT 2+2 Fastback
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1968 Ford Mustang GT 2+2 Fastback — found near Playa Azul

locations.name: Barn Find - 1967 Ford Racing Escort MK1
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1967 Ford Racing Escort MK1 — found near La Gran Caldera volcano

locations.name: Barn Find - 1970 GMC Jimmy
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1970 GMC Jimmy — found in the Baja California desert northwest

locations.name: Barn Find - 1991 Jaguar Sport XJR-15
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1991 Jaguar Sport XJR-15 — found near Copper Canyon

locations.name: Barn Find - 1973 Porsche 911 Carrera RS
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1973 Porsche 911 Carrera RS — found in the Guanajuato hills

locations.name: Barn Find - 1968 Renault 4L Export
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1968 Renault 4L Export — found near the Tulum ruins

locations.name: Barn Find - 1993 Toyota #1 T100 Baja Truck
locations.description: Hidden barn containing the 1993 Toyota #1 T100 Baja Truck — found near Dunas Blancas

locations.name: Guanajuato
locations.description: Historic colonial city in northeast Mexico — orange terracotta rooftops in the hills

locations.name: Playa Azul
locations.description: Coastal beach resort on the eastern coast — Horizon Apex outpost nearby

locations.name: La Gran Caldera
locations.description: Massive volcanic crater — north-center of the map, visible from far away

locations.name: Tulum
locations.description: Ancient Mayan ruins in the southeast jungle

locations.name: Dunas Blancas
locations.description: White sand dunes on the northwest coast

locations.name: Hotel Castillo
locations.description: Luxury hotel in Guanajuato — costs 5,000,000 CR, grants daily Wheelspin

locations.name: Casa Bella
locations.description: Free starter house near the Horizon Festival — unlocks Skill Songs

locations.name: Horizon Festival México
locations.description: Main Horizon Festival site — center-left of the map

locations.name: Horizon Apex Outpost
locations.description: Apex outpost near Tulum — unlocked via Tulum Expedition, enables Road Racing events

locations.name: Horizon Baja Outpost
locations.description: Baja outpost in the northwest desert — unlocked via Baja Expedition, enables Cross Country events

locations.name: Horizon Wilds Outpost
locations.description: Wilds outpost in the jungle — unlocked via Jungle Expedition, enables Dirt Racing events

locations.name: Horizon Rush Outpost
locations.description: Rush outpost at Copper Canyon — unlocked via Canyon Expedition, enables PR Stunts events

locations.name: Horizon Street Scene Outpost
locations.description: Street Scene outpost in Guanajuato — unlocked via Guanajuato Expedition, enables Street Racing events

locations.name: Danger Sign - Desert Dunes
locations.description: Jump ramp in the Baja dunes — ★★★ 1,050 ft

locations.name: Danger Sign - Basejump
locations.description: Epic jump near La Gran Caldera — ★★★ 1,650 ft

locations.name: Danger Sign - Launch Control
locations.description: Jump from the jungle aerodrome — ★★★ 1,450 ft

locations.name: Speed Trap - Federal Highway
locations.description: Speed measurement on the main Federal Highway — ★★★ 270 mph

locations.name: Speed Trap - Oceano Azul
locations.description: Speed trap on the eastern coastal road — ★★★ 225 mph

locations.name: Speed Zone - Trebol
locations.description: High-speed cloverleaf interchange — ★★★ 260 mph

locations.name: Drift Zone - Cara Este
locations.description: Volcanic hillside drift zone — ★★★ 500,000 pts

locations.name: Trailblazer - The Juggernaut
locations.description: Epic mega-trailblazer across all of Mexico (Horizon Rush) — 300s time limit

locations.name: Trailblazer - Sand and Deliver
locations.description: Desert trailblazer in the Baja dunes — 65s time limit

locations.name: Road Race - The Goliath
locations.description: The ultimate 34-mile Horizon Festival Mexico circuit — starts at the main festival site

locations.name: Road Race - Horizon Mexico Circuit
locations.description: 2.0 mile circuit around the Horizon Festival Mexico site — 3 laps

locations.name: Dirt Race - Barranca Trail
locations.description: 3.9 mile dirt trail descending Copper Canyon switchbacks

locations.name: Cross Country - Ek' Balam Circuit
locations.description: Cross country circuit around the ancient Ek' Balam ruins — 3 laps

locations.name: Street Race - Tunnel Run
locations.description: 3.5 mile street race using Guanajuato's tunnel network

locations.name: Drag Race - Aerodromo Drag Strip
locations.description: 1 mile drag strip on a derelict jungle runway — Aeródromo en La Selva

locations.name: Tulum Expedition
locations.description: Expedition starting near Tulum — unlocks Horizon Apex Outpost and Road Racing events

locations.name: Baja Expedition
locations.description: Expedition in the Baja desert — unlocks Horizon Baja Outpost and Cross Country events

locations.name: Treasure Chest - Mulegé Beach
locations.description: Seasonal treasure chest on the west coast beach near Mulegé

locations.name: Treasure Chest - Ek' Balam Ruins
locations.description: Seasonal treasure chest near the ancient Ek' Balam jungle ruins

locations.name: Showcase - On A Wing And A Prayer
locations.description: First showcase event at the Horizon Festival — race against an aircraft. Reward: 1994 Hoonigan Ford Escort RS Cosworth

locations.name: Showcase - Buggy And The Beast
locations.description: Desert showcase at Horizon Baja — unlocked through Horizon Baja outpost
